subcodes.first_line: O my God, my Hope and Ultimate Goal of my desires! These are servants who have bowed down before Thy sovereignty and have humbled themselves before the power of Thy proof [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی و رجائی و غایت آمالی هولاء عباد خضعوا لسلطانک و خشعوا لقوه برهانک و
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @prayer for protection
